title: stellilabium standleyi
intro: Stellilabium standleyi is a species of orchid native to Central America. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stellilabium standleyi can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
